evaluators.name: Cheapest Weekend Hot-tub Chalet Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user opened the booking form for a 2-night March weekend stay for 4 adults in the cheapest chalet that has a hot tub, is within 5 km of the ski lifts, and is under $250/night.

evaluators.name: Compare Chalets and Favorite Highest-rated Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared at least two chalets in the $180–$220/night range and favorited the compared chalet with the highest rating (or most reviews if tied).

evaluators.name: Cheapest Early-July Pet-friendly Sauna Chalet Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user opened booking review for a 5-night early-July stay for 6 adults and 2 children in the cheapest pet-friendly chalet with a sauna and 3+ bedrooms with total stay price under $2000.

evaluators.name: Five-item Fridge-stocking Grocery Order Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart has exactly 5 items: 2 different breakfast items under $8, 2 different dinner mains between $10 and $20, and 1 snack rated at least 4.5, with chalet fridge stocking delivery on the booking's check-in day.

evaluators.name: Winter Gear Bundle Under $180 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the cart includes exactly one ski gloves item, one beanie, and one thermal socks item (all 4.5+ rating, free shipping), uses blue variants when available, and keeps subtotal under $180.

evaluators.name: Firewood and Game Night Chalet Delivery Order Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a chalet delivery order includes 2 packs of firewood, 1 box of matches, 3 candles, and two different board games (one 2–4 players, one 4–8 players), scheduled for delivery on the next booking's check-in date.

evaluators.name: Two Digital Chalet Gift Vouchers Payment-step Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created an order with two digital chalet gift cards of different values between $40 and $120, both email-delivered with the same message, and opened the payment method selection page.

evaluators.name: Manage Booking Extras Under Budget Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added airport transfer, daily breakfast, and late checkout extras to booking ABC123, while keeping total add-ons under $150 per adult and saving the updated totals on the booking.
